name: open-multi-agent
description: TypeScript multi-agent orchestration engine — one runTeam() call from goal to result. Multi-model teams, auto task decomposition, parallel execution. 3 runtime dependencies.
summaryZh: TypeScript multi-agent orchestration engine — one runTeam() call from goal to result. Multi-model teams, auto task decomposition, parallel execution. 3 runtime dependencies. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
